# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['java', 'python', 'nodejs', 'go', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type for default command suggestions'
        )
        string(
            name: 'WORKSPACE_DIR',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Working directory relative to the repository root'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SETUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Setting up environment..."
# Add setup commands here, e.g.:
# apt-get update && apt-get install -y dependencies
# pip install virtualenv
# nvm use 18''',
            description: 'Shell commands to set up the build environment (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running build..."
# Add build commands here, e.g.:
# mvn clean package
# npm install && npm run build
# go build ./...
# python setup.py build''',
            description: 'Shell commands to build the project (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running tests..."
# Add test commands here, e.g.:
# mvn test
# npm test
# go test ./...
# pytest --junitxml=reports/test-results.xml''',
            description: 'Shell commands to run tests (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CODE_QUALITY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running code quality checks..."
# Add code quality commands here, e.g.:
# mvn sonar:sonar
# npm run lint
# golangci-lint run
# flake8 . --count --show-source --statistics''',
            description: 'Shell commands for code quality analysis (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PACKAGE_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Packaging artifacts..."
# Add packaging commands here, e.g.:
# mvn package -DskipTests
# npm pack
# docker build -t myapp:latest .
# tar -czf app.tar.gz dist/''',
            description: 'Shell commands to package the application (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Deploying application..."
# Add deployment commands here, e.g.:
# kubectl apply -f k8s/
# aws s3 sync dist/ s3://my-bucket/
# scp target/*.jar user@server:/opt/app/
# docker push myapp:latest''',
            description: 'Shell commands to deploy the application (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Running post-deployment verification..."
# Add post-deployment commands here, e.g.:
# curl -f http://myapp.example.com/health
# ./smoke-tests.sh
# newman run postman_collection.json''',
            description: 'Shell commands to verify deployment (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CLEANUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '''echo "Cleaning up..."
# Add cleanup commands here, e.g.:
# docker system prune -f
# rm -rf temp/
# kubectl delete pods --field-selector=status.phase==Succeeded''',
            description: 'Shell commands for cleanup (one per line)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS',
            defaultValue: '''# Define environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)
# APP_ENV=staging
# JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx512m
# NODE_ENV=production''',
            description: 'Custom environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Glob pattern for archiving artifacts (e.g., target/*.jar, dist/**/*). Leave empty to skip.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_REPORT_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Glob pattern for JUnit test reports (e.g., **/test-results.xml, **/surefire-reports/*.xml). Leave empty to skip.'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the test stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_CODE_QUALITY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the code quality stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the deployment stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_POST_DEPLOY',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip the post-deployment verification stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Print commands without executing them (prepends echo to each command)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '60',
            description: 'Overall pipeline timeout in minutes'
        )
    }

    options {
        timestamps()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        timeout(time: params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES ? params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES.toInteger() : 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================"
                    echo "Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "============================================"
                    echo "Project Type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Workspace Directory: ${params.WORKSPACE_DIR}"
                    echo "Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Code Quality: ${params.SKIP_CODE_QUALITY}"
                    echo "Skip Deploy: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Skip Post-Deploy: ${params.SKIP_POST_DEPLOY}"
                    echo "Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "Timeout: ${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES} minutes"
                    echo "============================================"

                    // Parse and set custom environment variables
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS?.trim()) {
                        def envLines = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS.trim().split('\n')
                        envLines.each { line ->
                            def trimmedLine = line.trim()
                            if (trimmedLine && !trimmedLine.startsWith('#') && trimmedLine.contains('=')) {
                                def parts = trimmedLine.split('=', 2)
                                def key = parts[0].trim()
                                def value = parts[1].trim()
                                env."${key}" = value
                                echo "Set environment variable: ${key}=${value}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.SETUP_COMMANDS, 'Setup', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.BUILD_COMMANDS, 'Build', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.TEST_COMMANDS, 'Test', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        if (params.TEST_REPORT_PATTERN?.trim()) {
                            try {
                                junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: params.TEST_REPORT_PATTERN.trim()
                                echo "Test reports collected from pattern: ${params.TEST_REPORT_PATTERN}"
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "Warning: Could not collect test reports - ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Code Quality') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_CODE_QUALITY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.CODE_QUALITY_COMMANDS, 'Code Quality', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS, 'Package', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
            post {
                success {
                    script {
                        if (params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN?.trim()) {
                            try {
                                archiveArtifacts artifacts: params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN.trim(), allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
                                echo "Artifacts archived from pattern: ${params.ARTIFACT_PATTERN}"
                            } catch (Exception e) {
                                echo "Warning: Could not archive artifacts - ${e.message}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                        input message: 'Proceed with deployment?', ok: 'Deploy'
                    }
                    executeUserCommands(params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS, 'Deploy', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_DEPLOY && !params.SKIP_POST_DEPLOY }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS, 'Post-Deploy Verification', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Cleanup') {
            steps {
                script {
                    executeUserCommands(params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS, 'Cleanup', params.WORKSPACE_DIR, params.DRY_RUN)
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "============================================"
            echo "Pipeline completed SUCCESSFULLY"
            echo "============================================"
        }
        failure {
            echo "============================================"
            echo "Pipeline FAILED - check logs for details"
            echo "============================================"
        }
        unstable {
            echo "============================================"
            echo "Pipeline completed with UNSTABLE status"
            echo "============================================"
        }
        always {
            echo "Pipeline finished at: ${new Date()}"
            cleanWs notFailBuild: true
        }
    }
}

def executeUserCommands(String commandBlock, String stageName, String workDir, Boolean dryRun) {
    if (!commandBlock?.trim()) {
        echo "No commands specified for stage: ${stageName}. Skipping."
        return
    }

    def commands = commandBlock.trim().split('\n')
    def filteredCommands = commands.findAll { line ->
        def trimmed = line.trim()
        trimmed && !trimmed.startsWith('#')
    }

    if (filteredCommands.isEmpty()) {
        echo "No executable commands found for stage: ${stageName} (only comments/empty lines). Skipping."
        return
    }

    echo "--------------------------------------------"
    echo "Executing ${stageName} commands (${filteredCommands.size()} command(s))..."
    echo "Working directory: ${workDir}"
    echo "--------------------------------------------"

    def scriptContent = new StringBuilder()
    scriptContent.append('#!/bin/bash\n')
    scriptContent.append('set -euo pipefail\n')
    scriptContent.append('\n')

    if (workDir && workDir != '.') {
        scriptContent.append("cd \"${workDir}\"\n")
        scriptContent.append("echo \"Changed to directory: \$(pwd)\"\n")
        scriptContent.append('\n')
    }

    filteredCommands.each { cmd ->
        def trimmedCmd = cmd.trim()
        if (dryRun) {
            scriptContent.append("echo \"[DRY RUN] ${trimmedCmd.replace('"', '\\"')}\"\n")
        } else {
            scriptContent.append("echo \">>> Executing: ${trimmedCmd.replace('"', '\\"')}\"\n")
            scriptContent.append("${trimmedCmd}\n")
            scriptContent.append("echo \">>> Command completed successfully\"\n")
        }
        scriptContent.append('\n')
    }

    sh scriptContent.toString()

    echo "--------------------------------------------"
    echo "${stageName} stage completed."
    echo "--------------------------------------------"
}
